title: Finite Random Variable Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite random-variable bad pushforward QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Malformed finite pushforward-distribution row where exact replay sums source atom mass 1/4 for the long outcome but the false distribution claims 1/2.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional pushforward, expectation, or independence rows only when they add distinct exact-linear solver pressure; keep measurable random variables, conditional expectation, martingales, and continuous distributions in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite random variables as total finite functions from probability atoms to outcome labels.
Replay finite pushforward, expectation, and independence witnesses through exact rational model evaluation.
Emit checked finite counterexample evidence for rejected pushforward-distribution claims; the bad pushforward row now has checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence.
Keep general measurable functions, conditional expectation, stochastic kernels, martingales, and continuous random variables marked Lean-horizon until no-sorry Lean artifacts exist.
